'''Gardulla Besadii the Younger''' was the son of [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]] and the brother of [[Decca Besadii Diori]]. He was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] advisor to [[Borga Besadii Diori]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], who suggested giving information of the Vong to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Char-stub}}
